digest.title: Introducing Claude Opus 5
digest.tldr: Opus 5 is a step change improvement for the Opus tier powering long-running agents while delivering improvements in coding and professional work.

digest.title: Meta AI Doesn’t Just Think, It Acts
digest.tldr: 1, Meta AI, can now build, plan, and follow through from start to finish.  The post Meta AI Doesn’t Just Think, It Acts appeared first on Meta Newsroom .

digest.title: Be skeptical of OpenAI's rogue hacker agent story
Anthropic releases Opus 5 with ‘close’ to Fable 5’s capabilities
digest.tldr: Weeks after Anthropic's latest toe-to-toe with the US government, and days after an OpenAI security incident that dominated tech industry discussions, Anthropic on Thursday released its newest model, Claude Opus 5.
